author: Labtopia
description: Recursively polls for new files added to the vault from outside Obsidian and reconciles them automatically. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Labtopia
manifest.description: Recursively polls for new files added to the vault from external sources and reconciles them automatically. Fixes missing file explorer refresh on Flatpak, network drives, and sync tools.
manifest.name: Vault File Refresh

name: Vault File Refresh

releases.author: tikitock
releases.description: Fix reconcileFile call: pass required rawPath and deleted args (3-arg signature). Calling with 1 arg left rawPath undefined, silently failing stat lookup on externally-written files.

releases.author: tikitock
releases.description: Poll interval now catches errors and keeps running. Previous versions could silently stop polling if an internal API call failed.
releases.name: 1.0.2 — Hardened polling

releases.author: tikitock
releases.description: Removes the word "Obsidian" from the plugin description per community plugin directory guidelines.
releases.name: 1.0.1 — Fix manifest description

releases.author: tikitock
releases.description:
Initial release of Vault File Refresh.

Automatically detects and reconciles files added to your Obsidian vault from outside the app. Fixes missing file explorer refresh on Flatpak installs, network drives, and external sync tools.

**Install manually:**
1. Download `main.js` and `manifest.json` from this release
2. Place them in `.obsidian/plugins/vault-file-refresh/` inside your vault
3. Enable the plugin in Obsidian Settings > Community Plugins
releases.name: v1.0.0 — Initial Release
